name: Vanguard
description: A stalwart frontliner who draws enemy fire and holds the line through raw toughness.

name: Arcanist
description: A disciplined spellcaster who leverages arcane theory and mental acuity from a safe distance.

name: Prowler
description: A swift operative who exploits momentum and positioning to strike before the target reacts.

name: Warden
description: A resilient guardian who channels divine discipline to protect allies and outlast any threat.
